title: erigeron unalaschkensis
intro: Erigeron unalaschkensis, also known as Aleutian daisy or Aleut daisy, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Aleutian Islands in Alaska. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron unalaschkensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, salves, or tinctures for medicinal use.
